---
title: "MTS Baseline"
author: "Hammed"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# data setup

```{r}
msa_data_level <- read.csv("MSA_data.csv", header = TRUE)
msa_data <-sqrt(msa_data_level)
mdata <- data.frame(lapply(msa_data, diff)) # First difference
MSA_data<-data.frame(lapply(msa_data, function(x) diff(x, differences = 2))) # Second difference
MSA_data<-as.matrix(MSA_data)
head(MSA_data)
```


# Baseline MTS Gibbs sampler

```{r}
# Required libraries
library(MASS)
library(coda)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)

# prior values from a pre-sample of y0
mu_0 = 0.0501835 
sigma0_sq = 0.003921744

# Helper: sample from discrete grid (generic)
sample_rho <- function(rho_grid, log_post) {
  probs <- exp(log_post - max(log_post))
  probs <- probs / sum(probs)
  sample(rho_grid, size = 1, prob = probs)
}

# Gibbs Sampler
# leave_last_out = TRUE means:
#   - fit the model on rows 1,...,T-1
#   - hold out the last row for forecast evaluation
run_gibbs_full <- function(MSA_data, n_iter = 16000, burn = 1000, thin = 15,
                           leave_last_out = FALSE) {

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Leave out the last time point if requested
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  if (leave_last_out) {
    MSA_fit  <- MSA_data[-nrow(MSA_data), , drop = FALSE]   # training sample: 1,...,T-1
    MSA_test <- MSA_data[nrow(MSA_data), , drop = FALSE]    # held-out last row: T
  } else {
    MSA_fit  <- MSA_data
    MSA_test <- NULL
  }

  T <- nrow(MSA_fit)   # this is now T-1 when leave_last_out = TRUE
  L <- ncol(MSA_fit)
  keep <- seq(burn + 1, n_iter, by = thin)
  n_keep <- length(keep)

  # --- Grids ---
  rho_grid  <- seq(0.05, 0.95, length.out = 100)   # for tau_mu and tau_b
  rho3_grid <- seq(-0.95, 0.95, length.out = 100) # for correlation rho

  # --- Pull fixed hyperparameters for y0 prior from global env ---
  mu_0 <- 0.05018355 
  if (exists("mu_0", envir = .GlobalEnv)) {
    mu0 <- get("mu_0", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  } else if (exists("mu0", envir = .GlobalEnv)) {
    mu0 <- get("mu0", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  } else {
    stop("Missing fixed hyperparameter for y0 prior: define mu_0 (or mu0) in the global environment.")
  }

  sigma0_sq <- 0.003921744
  if (exists("sigma0_sq", envir = .GlobalEnv)) {
    sigma0_sq <- get("sigma0_sq", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  } else if (exists("sigma0_2", envir = .GlobalEnv)) {
    sigma0_sq <- get("sigma0_2", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  } else if (exists("sigma_0", envir = .GlobalEnv)) {
    sigma0_sq <- get("sigma_0", envir = .GlobalEnv)^2
  } else if (exists("sigma0", envir = .GlobalEnv)) {
    sigma0_sq <- get("sigma0", envir = .GlobalEnv)^2
  } else {
    stop("Missing fixed hyperparameter for y0 prior variance: define sigma0_sq (variance) OR sigma_0/sigma0 (sd) in the global environment.")
  }
  if (!is.finite(sigma0_sq) || sigma0_sq <= 0) stop("sigma0_sq must be positive and finite.")

  # --- Initial values ---
  mu <- b <- numeric(L)
  for (i in 1:L) {
    y  <- MSA_fit[-1, i]
    xl <- MSA_fit[-T, i]
    fit <- lm.fit(cbind(1, xl), y)
    mu[i] <- fit$coefficients[1]
    b[i]  <- fit$coefficients[2]
  }

  y0 <- rep(0, L)
  sigma2 <- 0.005
  theta1 <- mean(mu)
  theta2 <- mean(b)

  # rho1 and rho2 are tau_mu and tau_b; rho3 is correlation rho
  rho1 <- 0.5
  rho2 <- 0.5
  rho3 <- 0

  # Storage
  mu_store <- matrix(0, n_keep, L)
  b_store <- matrix(0, n_keep, L)
  y0_store <- matrix(0, n_keep, L)
  sigma2_store <- numeric(n_keep)
  theta1_store <- numeric(n_keep)
  theta2_store <- numeric(n_keep)
  rho1_store <- numeric(n_keep)
  rho2_store <- numeric(n_keep)
  rho3_store <- numeric(n_keep)

  k <- 1
  for (iter in 1:n_iter) {

    tau_mu <- rho1
    tau_b  <- rho2
    rho    <- rho3

    sigmu2 <- (1 - tau_mu) / tau_mu
    sigb2  <- (1 - tau_b)  / tau_b
    sigmu  <- sqrt(sigmu2)
    sigb   <- sqrt(sigb2)

    tilde_Sigma <- matrix(
      c(sigmu2, rho * sigmu * sigb,
        rho * sigmu * sigb, sigb2),
      nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE
    )
    tilde_Sigma_inv <- solve(tilde_Sigma)

    m0 <- c(theta1, theta2)

    # ---------- (A) Sample y0_i and (mu_i, b_i) in blocks ----------
    for (i in 1:L) {
      y <- MSA_fit[, i]

      V0i <- 1 / (1 / sigma0_sq + (b[i]^2) / sigma2)
      m0i <- V0i * (mu0 / sigma0_sq + b[i] * (y[1] - mu[i]) / sigma2)
      y0[i] <- rnorm(1, mean = m0i, sd = sqrt(V0i))

      y_lag <- c(y0[i], y[1:(T - 1)])
      X_i   <- cbind(1, y_lag)
      y_i   <- y

      XtX <- crossprod(X_i)
      XtY <- crossprod(X_i, y_i)

      V_i <- solve(tilde_Sigma_inv + (1 / sigma2) * XtX)
      m_i <- V_i %*% (tilde_Sigma_inv %*% m0 + (1 / sigma2) * XtY)

      beta_i <- MASS::mvrnorm(1, mu = as.numeric(m_i), Sigma = V_i)
      mu[i] <- beta_i[1]
      b[i]  <- beta_i[2]
    }

    # ---------- (B) Blocked update for theta ----------
    beta_bar <- c(mean(mu), mean(b))
    theta <- MASS::mvrnorm(1, mu = beta_bar, Sigma = (1 / L) * tilde_Sigma)
    theta1 <- theta[1]
    theta2 <- theta[2]

    # ---------- (C) CPD for sigma^2 ----------
    SSE <- 0
    for (i in 1:L) {
      y <- MSA_fit[, i]
      y_lag <- c(y0[i], y[1:(T - 1)])
      resid <- y - mu[i] - b[i] * y_lag
      SSE <- SSE + sum(resid^2)
    }
    shape <- (L * T) / 2
    rate  <- SSE / 2
    sigma2 <- 1 / rgamma(1, shape = shape, rate = rate)

    # ---------- (D) Grid sampling for tau_mu ----------
    dmu <- mu - theta1
    db  <- b  - theta2
    S11 <- sum(dmu^2)
    S22 <- sum(db^2)
    S12 <- sum(dmu * db)

    log_post_rho1 <- sapply(rho_grid, function(tau_candidate) {
      sigmu2_c <- (1 - tau_candidate) / tau_candidate
      sigb2_c  <- (1 - rho2) / rho2
      sigmu_c  <- sqrt(sigmu2_c)
      sigb_c   <- sqrt(sigb2_c)
      logdet <- log(sigmu2_c) + log(sigb2_c) + log(1 - rho3^2)
      quad <- (S11 / sigmu2_c - 2 * rho3 * S12 / (sigmu_c * sigb_c) + S22 / sigb2_c) / (1 - rho3^2)
      -(L / 2) * logdet - 0.5 * quad
    })
    rho1 <- sample_rho(rho_grid, log_post_rho1)

    # ---------- (E) Grid sampling for tau_b ----------
    log_post_rho2 <- sapply(rho_grid, function(tau_candidate) {
      sigmu2_c <- (1 - rho1) / rho1
      sigb2_c  <- (1 - tau_candidate) / tau_candidate
      sigmu_c  <- sqrt(sigmu2_c)
      sigb_c   <- sqrt(sigb2_c)
      logdet <- log(sigmu2_c) + log(sigb2_c) + log(1 - rho3^2)
      quad <- (S11 / sigmu2_c - 2 * rho3 * S12 / (sigmu_c * sigb_c) + S22 / sigb2_c) / (1 - rho3^2)
      -(L / 2) * logdet - 0.5 * quad
    })
    rho2 <- sample_rho(rho_grid, log_post_rho2)

    # ---------- (F) Grid sampling for rho ----------
    sigmu2_fix <- (1 - rho1) / rho1
    sigb2_fix  <- (1 - rho2) / rho2
    sigmu_fix  <- sqrt(sigmu2_fix)
    sigb_fix   <- sqrt(sigb2_fix)

    log_post_rho3 <- sapply(rho3_grid, function(rho_candidate) {
      if (abs(rho_candidate) >= 1) return(-Inf)
      quad_num <- (S11 / sigmu2_fix - 2 * rho_candidate * S12 / (sigmu_fix * sigb_fix) + S22 / sigb2_fix)
      -(L / 2) * log(1 - rho_candidate^2) - 0.5 * quad_num / (1 - rho_candidate^2)
    })
    rho3 <- sample_rho(rho3_grid, log_post_rho3)

    # ---------- Store ----------
    if (iter %in% keep) {
      mu_store[k, ] <- mu
      b_store[k, ] <- b
      y0_store[k, ] <- y0
      sigma2_store[k] <- sigma2
      theta1_store[k] <- theta1
      theta2_store[k] <- theta2
      rho1_store[k] <- rho1
      rho2_store[k] <- rho2
      rho3_store[k] <- rho3
      k <- k + 1
    }
  }

  list(
    mu = mu_store,
    b = b_store,
    sigma2 = sigma2_store,
    theta1 = theta1_store,
    theta2 = theta2_store,
    rho1 = rho1_store,
    rho2 = rho2_store,
    rho3 = rho3_store,
    y0 = y0_store,
    train_data = MSA_fit,
    test_data = MSA_test
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Posterior predictive forecast for the held-out last row
# ------------------------------------------------------------
forecast_last_value <- function(gibbs_result) {
  if (is.null(gibbs_result$test_data)) {
    stop("No held-out observation found. Refit using leave_last_out = TRUE.")
  }

  MSA_fit <- gibbs_result$train_data
  y_prev  <- MSA_fit[nrow(MSA_fit), ]       # this is y_{T-1}
  y_true  <- as.numeric(gibbs_result$test_data[1, ])  # true held-out y_T

  n_draws <- length(gibbs_result$sigma2)
  L <- ncol(MSA_fit)

  pred_draws <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_draws, ncol = L)

  for (s in 1:n_draws) {
    pred_mean <- gibbs_result$mu[s, ] + gibbs_result$b[s, ] * y_prev
    pred_draws[s, ] <- rnorm(L, mean = pred_mean, sd = sqrt(gibbs_result$sigma2[s]))
  }

  if (is.null(colnames(MSA_fit))) {
    msa_names <- paste0("MSA_", 1:L)
  } else {
    msa_names <- colnames(MSA_fit)
  }

  forecast_summary <- data.frame(
    MSA = msa_names,
    actual_last_value = y_true,
    forecast_mean = colMeans(pred_draws),
    forecast_median = apply(pred_draws, 2, median),
    lower_95 = apply(pred_draws, 2, quantile, probs = 0.025),
    upper_95 = apply(pred_draws, 2, quantile, probs = 0.975)
  )

  forecast_summary$error <- forecast_summary$actual_last_value - forecast_summary$forecast_mean
  forecast_summary$abs_error <- abs(forecast_summary$error)

  list(
    draws = pred_draws,
    summary = forecast_summary
  )
}

# ========================== Run leave-one-out fit ==========================
result_loo <- run_gibbs_full(MSA_data, leave_last_out = TRUE)

# ========================== Forecast held-out last row =====================
loo_forecast <- forecast_last_value(result_loo)

# View forecast table
print(loo_forecast$summary)

# Example overall forecast accuracy
MAE  <- mean(loo_forecast$summary$abs_error)
RMSE <- sqrt(mean((loo_forecast$summary$error)^2))

cat("MAE  =", MAE, "\n")
cat("RMSE =", RMSE, "\n")

# ========================== Diagnostics ==========================
diag_out <- gibbs_diagnostics(result_loo)

print(diag_out$geweke)
print(diag_out$ess)

# ========================== Plots ==========================
plot_trace(result_loo, param = "mu", indices = 1:3)
plot_trace(result_loo, param = "b", indices = 1:3)
plot_trace(result_loo, param = "y0", indices = 1:3)

plot_trace(result_loo, param = "sigma2", indices = 1)
plot_trace(result_loo, param = "theta1", indices = 1)
plot_trace(result_loo, param = "theta2", indices = 1)
plot_trace(result_loo, param = "rho1", indices = 1)
plot_trace(result_loo, param = "rho2", indices = 1)
plot_trace(result_loo, param = "rho3", indices = 1)

print(plot_density(result_loo, "sigma2"))
print(plot_density(result_loo, "theta1"))
print(plot_density(result_loo, "theta2"))
print(plot_density(result_loo, "rho1"))
print(plot_density(result_loo, "rho2"))
print(plot_density(result_loo, "rho3"))

```



# Prediction summaries

```{r}
## ==============================================================
##  COPY-PASTE-READY CODE  –  SECOND-DIFFERENCE VERSION
##  LEAVE-ONE-OUT FORECAST OF THE FINAL OBSERVATION
## --------------------------------------------------------------
##  Assumes:
##    result_loo        – Gibbs output fitted to TRAINING sample only
##                        i.e. the last row of MSA_data was left out
##    MSA_data          – full Δ²√y series
##    mdata             – full Δ√y series
##    msa_data          – full √y series
##    msa_data_level    – full original level series
##
##  Output
##    pred_table  – PM, PSD, Bias, |Bias|/true, PRMSE, 95% HPDI
##    err_table   – Mean, SD, CV, 95% HPDI for relative error
## ==============================================================

library(coda)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Helper – simulate left-out Δ²√y_T for every retained Gibbs draw
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
predict_leftout_diff2 <- function(gibbs_result, last_train_row) {
  n_keep <- nrow(gibbs_result$mu)
  L      <- ncol(gibbs_result$mu)
  preds  <- matrix(NA_real_, n_keep, L)

  for (s in seq_len(n_keep)) {
    mu_s   <- gibbs_result$mu[s, ]
    b_s    <- gibbs_result$b[s, ]
    sig2_s <- gibbs_result$sigma2[s]

    eps_s <- rnorm(L, mean = 0, sd = sqrt(sig2_s))
    preds[s, ] <- mu_s + b_s * last_train_row + eps_s
  }

  preds
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Wrapper – forecast omitted last value and back-transform to level
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
predict_leftout_level_2diff <- function(gibbs_result,
                                        MSA_data,        # full Δ²√y
                                        mdata,           # full Δ√y
                                        msa_data,        # full √y
                                        msa_data_level,  # full y
                                        prob = 0.95) {

  L <- ncol(MSA_data)

  # -------------------------------------------------------------
  # Training/sample alignment for leave-one-out forecast
  #
  # Full transformed objects contain the last observation.
  # Since the Gibbs sampler was fitted after dropping the last row
  # of MSA_data, the forecast target is the omitted final row.
  # -------------------------------------------------------------
  T_full   <- nrow(MSA_data)
  T_train  <- T_full - 1

  # Last observed row used in estimation: Δ²√y_{T-1}
  diff2_lag <- as.numeric(MSA_data[T_train, ])

  # Omitted row we are forecasting: Δ²√y_T
  diff2_true <- as.numeric(MSA_data[T_full, ])

  # To undo one difference:
  # Δ√y_T = Δ²√y_T + Δ√y_{T-1}
  diff1_prev <- as.numeric(mdata[nrow(mdata) - 1, ])

  # To undo the second difference:
  # √y_T = Δ√y_T + √y_{T-1}
  sqrt_prev <- as.numeric(msa_data[nrow(msa_data) - 1, ])

  # True held-out level y_T
  true_level <- as.numeric(msa_data_level[nrow(msa_data_level), ])

  # -------------------------------------------------------------
  # Simulate predictive draws for omitted Δ²√y_T
  # -------------------------------------------------------------
  diff2_preds <- predict_leftout_diff2(gibbs_result, diff2_lag)

  # Undo 1st differencing: get Δ√ŷ_T
  diff1_preds <- sweep(diff2_preds, 2, diff1_prev, "+")

  # Undo 2nd differencing: get √ŷ_T
  sqrt_preds <- sweep(diff1_preds, 2, sqrt_prev, "+")

  # Undo square-root transform: get ŷ_T
  level_preds <- sqrt_preds^2

  # -------------------------------------------------------------
  # Prediction summaries
  # -------------------------------------------------------------
  PM   <- colMeans(level_preds)
  PSD  <- apply(level_preds, 2, sd)
  Bias <- PM - true_level
  PARB <- abs(Bias / true_level)
  PRMSE <- sqrt(Bias^2 + PSD^2)

  hpdi <- t(apply(level_preds, 2, function(x) {
    HPDinterval(as.mcmc(x), prob = prob)[1, ]
  }))

  msa_names <- if (!is.null(colnames(MSA_data))) colnames(MSA_data) else paste0("MSA_", seq_len(L))

  pred_table <- data.frame(
    MSA       = msa_names,
    True      = true_level,
    PM        = PM,
    PSD       = PSD,
    Bias      = Bias,
    PARB      = PARB,
    PRMSE     = PRMSE,
    HPDI      = sprintf("(%.4f, %.4f)", hpdi[, 1], hpdi[, 2]),
    row.names = NULL
  )

  list(
    diff2_true  = diff2_true,
    level_preds = level_preds,
    true_level  = true_level,
    pred_table  = pred_table
  )
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Relative-error summary
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
error_summary <- function(level_preds, true_level, prob = 0.95) {
  L <- ncol(level_preds)

  rel_err <- sweep(level_preds, 2, true_level, "-") / true_level

  Mean_R <- colMeans(rel_err)
  SD_R   <- apply(rel_err, 2, sd)
  CV_R   <- ifelse(abs(Mean_R) < .Machine$double.eps, NA, SD_R / abs(Mean_R))

  hpdi <- t(apply(rel_err, 2, function(x) {
    HPDinterval(as.mcmc(x), prob = prob)[1, ]
  }))

  msa_names <- if (!is.null(colnames(level_preds))) colnames(level_preds) else paste0("MSA_", seq_len(L))

  data.frame(
    MSA  = msa_names,
    Mean = Mean_R,
    SD   = SD_R,
    CV   = CV_R,
    HPDI = sprintf("(%.4f, %.4f)", hpdi[, 1], hpdi[, 2]),
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. RUN EVERYTHING
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
pred_out <- predict_leftout_level_2diff(
  gibbs_result    = result_loo,   # use the leave-one-out Gibbs fit
  MSA_data        = MSA_data,
  mdata           = mdata,
  msa_data        = msa_data,
  msa_data_level  = msa_data_level
)

pred_table <- pred_out$pred_table
err_table  <- error_summary(pred_out$level_preds, pred_out$true_level)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. View results
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n--- Prediction Metrics (leave-one-out final observation) ---\n")
print(pred_table, right = FALSE, digits = 4)

cat("\n--- Relative-Error Metrics ---\n")
print(err_table, right = FALSE, digits = 4)

write.csv(pred_table, "MTS_Pred_table_53.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(err_table,  "MTS_Error_table_53.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


# Prediction error summary

```{r}

# Load libraries
library(HDInterval)
library(dplyr)

compute_Rit_summary <- function(pred_level,
                                msa_data_level = NULL,
                                true_level = NULL,
                                cred_mass = 0.95) {
  
  if (is.null(true_level)) {
    if (is.null(msa_data_level)) {
      stop("Provide either true_level or msa_data_level.")
    }
    true_level <- as.numeric(msa_data_level[nrow(msa_data_level), ])
  } else {
    true_level <- as.numeric(true_level)
  }

  if (!is.matrix(pred_level)) {
    pred_level <- as.matrix(pred_level)
  }

  if (ncol(pred_level) != length(true_level)) {
    stop("Number of columns in pred_level must match length of true_level.")
  }

  # Relative prediction error:
  # R_it = (yhat_T^(s) - y_T) / y_T
  R_mat <- sweep(pred_level, 2, true_level, FUN = "-")
  R_mat <- sweep(R_mat, 2, true_level, FUN = "/")

  pm_rit  <- colMeans(R_mat)
  psd_rit <- apply(R_mat, 2, sd)
  hpdi <- t(apply(R_mat, 2, function(x) {
    HDInterval::hdi(x, credMass = cred_mass)
  }))

  msa_names <- colnames(pred_level)
  if (is.null(msa_names)) {
    msa_names <- paste0("MSA_", seq_len(ncol(R_mat)))
  }

  df <- data.frame(
    MSA     = msa_names,
    PM = round(pm_rit, 4),
    PSD = round(psd_rit, 4),
    HPDI    = paste0("(", round(hpdi[, 1], 4), ", ", round(hpdi[, 2], 4), ")"),
    row.names = NULL
  )

  return(df)
}

# pred_out came from predict_leftout_level_2diff(...)
pred_level_v1 <- pred_out$level_preds
true_level_v1 <- pred_out$true_level

Rit_v1 <- compute_Rit_summary(
  pred_level = pred_level_v1,
  true_level = true_level_v1
)

print("📌 Prediction Error Summary — Leave-one-out forecast of final observation:")
print(Rit_v1)

```
